act_name: The Protection of Women from Domestic Violence Act, 2005

section_titles: Section 1: Short title, extent and commencement
chapters.summary: This chapter introduces the Act and defines key terms. It explains the purpose and scope of the Act.
This chapter defines domestic violence and its various forms, including physical, emotional, and economic abuse.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter III: Powers and Duties of Protection Officers, Service Providers, Etc.
section_titles: Section 4: Information to Protection Officer and exclusion of liability of informant
Section 5: Duties of police officers, service providers and Magistrate
Section 9: Duties and functions of Protection Officers
chapters.summary: This chapter outlines the roles and responsibilities of Protection Officers, service providers, and government agencies in preventing and addressing domestic violence.

chapters.chapter_title: Chapter IV: Procedure for Obtaining Orders of Reliefs
section_titles: Section 16: Proceedings to be held in camera
Section 17: Right to reside in a shared household
Section 23: Power to grant interim and ex parte orders
Section 24: Court to give copies of order free of cost
Section 25: Duration and alteration of orders
Section 26: Relief in other suits and legal proceedings
chapters.summary: This chapter explains the procedures for obtaining protection orders, residence orders, and other forms of relief for victims of domestic violence.

section_titles: Section 30: Protection Officers and members of service providers to be public servants
Section 31: Penalty for breach of protection order by respondent
Section 33: Penalty for not discharging duty by Protection Officer
Section 34: Cognizance of offence committed by Protection Officer
Section 35: Protection of action taken in good faith
Section 36: Act not in derogation of any other law
Section 37: Power of Central Government to make rules
chapters.summary: This chapter covers various miscellaneous provisions, including appeals, penalties, and the power of the Central Government to make rules.
